main.description: Reassign a group's owner. Operator-only: authenticated with HTTP Basic auth (username "admin") against the service ADMIN_PASSWORD, not group membership. The previous owner is demoted to admin. The new owner is promoted in place if already a member, or added as a new owner member if not — supporting operator recovery when the incumbent owner is unavailable.

repo.description: The handle or DID of the target group.

newOwner.description: The handle or DID of the member to make owner.

previousOwner.description: The DID demoted from owner to admin, if there was one.

noop.description: True when newOwner was already the owner and nothing changed.

addedAsMember.description: True when newOwner was not previously a member and was added as a new owner member.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: newOwner is a malformed DID or an unresolvable handle.

errors.name: UnknownGroup
errors.description: The repo does not resolve to a managed group.
